description: GHG emissions data from EDGAR, transport and national totals by country, 1970-2024. Separate source from the GIZ-SLOCAT NDC Transport Tracker database (data/GIZ-SLOCAT_Transport-Tracker-database.xlsx). Merged with NDC policy data at render time per the two-track data architecture.

id_columns.EDGAR Country Code: ISO3-style EDGAR country code, used as join key against the GIZ-SLOCAT database
id_columns.Country: Country name as provided by EDGAR
id_columns.Region: Region grouping (largely empty in current extract)

Global_Emissions.description: Total national GHG emissions across all sectors

Transport_Emissions.description: GHG emissions from the transport sector

Share_Transport_National.description: Transport emissions as a share of national total emissions (0-1)

Share_Transport_Global.description: Transport emissions as a share of global total emissions (0-1)

Rank1_Sector.description: Largest emitting sector that year (categorical, no unit)

Rank2_Sector.description: Second largest emitting sector that year (categorical, no unit)

Rank3_Sector.description: Third largest emitting sector that year (categorical, no unit)

notes: Single EDGAR source line only; no version number in headers and no per-row source tag.
No sectoral breakdown beyond Rank1/2/3_Sector for now.
Numbers in the original CSV use comma as decimal separator inside quoted fields; the pipeline must parse these as floats (replace ',' with '.' before casting), not as plain CSV numerics.
